message:
fix(registry,oauth): double-checked cleanup locking, redundant clones, defensive filter

fcp-oauth TokenStore::maybe_cleanup() had a TOCTOU race where concurrent
callers could both pass the read-lock interval check and then run cleanup
twice. Apply double-checked locking: re-verify elapsed time under write
lock before proceeding.

fcp-registry LocalRegistryCatalog::target_descriptor() cloned os/arch
strings twice — once into locals, then again into the struct literal.
Hoist format! calls before the struct literal so os/arch can be moved
instead of re-cloned.

fcp-registry sorted_version_entries() used unchecked [0] indexing on
version record vecs. While insert() ensures vecs are never empty in
practice, add a defensive filter(|v| !v.is_empty()) to prevent panics
if invariants are ever broken by future changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
